title: Meritage Q1 2026 shows why incentives are the new battlefield

title: Powell is done. Will Warsh help with mortgage rates?
content: Jerome Powell's tenure as Federal Reserve chair is coming to an end as the Department of Justice (DOJ) has ended its investigation of alleged cost overruns on the Fed headquarters' renovations.
